allow: Bash(python -c "from django.urls import reverse; import django; import os; os.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE']='stmc_demo.settings'; django.setup\(\); print\(reverse\('sales_shell_edit', args=[1]\)\); print\(reverse\('sales_turnkey_edit', args=[1]\)\); print\(reverse\('sales_in_progress_panel'\)\); print\(reverse\('sales_closed_panel'\)\); print\(reverse\('sales_finalize_contract', args=[1]\)\)")

Bash(python manage.py shell -c "from django.urls import reverse; print\(reverse\('sales_shell_edit', args=[1]\)\); print\(reverse\('sales_turnkey_edit', args=[1]\)\); print\(reverse\('sales_in_progress_panel'\)\); print\(reverse\('sales_closed_panel'\)\); print\(reverse\('sales_finalize_contract', args=[1]\)\)")

Bash(python manage.py shell -c "from stmc_ops.models import Job; print\('Total jobs:', Job.objects.count\(\)\); print\('In progress:', Job.objects.filter\(sales_closed_at__isnull=True\).count\(\)\); print\('Closed:', Job.objects.filter\(sales_closed_at__isnull=False\).count\(\)\); j = Job.objects.first\(\); print\('Sample:', j.customer_name if j else None, '| sales_closed_at:', j.sales_closed_at if j else None, '| wizard_state keys:', list\(\(j.wizard_state or {}\).keys\(\)\) if j else None\)")

Bash(python manage.py shell -c "from stmc_ops.models import Job, AppUser; print\('Sales users:'\); [print\(' ', u.email, '|', repr\(u.name\)\) for u in AppUser.objects.filter\(role='sales'\)]; print\('Job sales_reps:'\); [print\(' ', repr\(j.sales_rep\), '|', j.customer_name\) for j in Job.objects.all\(\)]")
